args.sql:
SELECT teig.teigid, teig.matrikkelnummertekst, teig.lagretberegnetareal AS area_m2
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig AS teig
JOIN flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal AS f
ON ST_Intersects(teig.omrade, f.omrade)
WHERE teig.kommunenummer = '3301'
AND teig.lagretberegnetareal > 5000
AND f.gjentaksintervall = 200
ORDER BY teig.lagretberegnetareal DESC
LIMIT 10;
